parsed.production_notes: The image is a digital graphic designed to look like a social media post. It uses a small profile photo, which could be stock or AI-generated, set against a plain black background with text.

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid black background. In the upper left corner, there is a small, circular profile picture of a woman with dark hair.

scenes.visual_description: The image is a mockup of a social media post, likely from X (formerly Twitter), in dark mode. It features a profile picture of a woman named Yuki Tanaka. Below the profile info is a multi-line text post written in Japanese, comparing language learning apps. Standard social media interaction icons (reply, retweet, like) are at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Narrator says: Started running on 3 Jun 2026 · Total active time 21 hrs. Download.
scenes.on_screen_text:
Yuki Tanaka
@yukitanaka
Dec 3 ...

R.I.P. DUOLINGO. 3年間の連続記録。何も変わらなかった。
(R.I.P. DUOLINGO. 3-year streak. Nothing changed.)

Looraは6週間でやってくれた。
(Loora did it in 6 weeks.)

72時間でスタバで英語注文。
(Ordered in English at Starbucks in 72 hours.)

10日でエミネムの曲を字幕なしで理解。
(Understood Eminem songs without subtitles in 10 days.)

没入学習は、聞く・話すを自動運転にする。
(Immersive learning puts listening and speaking on autopilot.)

アプリを使い始めて2ヶ月半。
今ではネイティブみたいに話せる。
(Two and a half months since I started using the app. Now I can speak like a native.)
